SEARCH
Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.graph

Interface StaticGraph

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
public interface StaticGraph extends AutoCloseable
A compiled static topology graph.

Graph structure is fixed after StaticGraph.Builder.build(). Application code publishes through source emitters, observes immutable plan metadata through plan(), and reads counters through metrics().

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    StaticGraph.Builder
    Builder for a validated, immutable static topology.

    abort()

  • Method Details

    • builder

      static StaticGraph.Builder builder(String name)
      Creates a builder for a named graph.

    • plan

      GraphPlan plan()
      Returns the immutable plan compiled for this graph.

    • compilationReport

      default GraphCompilationReport compilationReport()
      Returns the immutable build-time report explaining physical runtime decisions for this graph.

    • metrics

      GraphMetrics metrics()
      Returns live graph, stage, and edge metrics.

    • emitter

      <T> Emitter<T> emitter(String sourceName, Class<T> type)
      Returns an emitter for a normal source.

    • preallocatedEmitter

      <T> PreallocatedEmitter<T> preallocatedEmitter(String sourceName, Class<T> type)
      Returns the claim/emit API for a preallocated source.

      Sources declared with StaticGraph.Builder.preallocatedSource(String, Class, PreallocationSpec) must be emitted through this method. Calling emitter(String, Class) for a preallocated source is rejected so callers do not accidentally bypass the source pool.

    • start

      void start()
      Starts graph worker threads.

    • stop

      void stop()
      Requests graph shutdown and waits according to runtime defaults.

    • stop

      boolean stop(Duration timeout)
      Requests graph shutdown and waits up to the timeout.
      Returns:
      true if the graph stopped before the timeout

    • quiesce

      boolean quiesce(Duration timeout)
      Pauses source acceptance and waits for in-flight work to drain.

    • resume

      void resume()
      Resumes a quiesced graph.

    • abort

      void abort()
      Stops the graph as failed and wakes waiting workers.

    • awaitTermination

      void awaitTermination() throws InterruptedException
      Waits until the graph reaches a terminal state.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • awaitTermination

      boolean awaitTermination(Duration timeout) throws InterruptedException
      Waits until the graph reaches a terminal state or timeout expires.
      Returns:
      true if the graph terminated before the timeout
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • state

      GraphState state()
      Returns the current graph lifecycle state.

    • failure

      Optional<Throwable> failure()
      Returns the failure that stopped the graph, when any.

    • close

      default void close()
      Specified by:
